title: AprsIsClient::login accepts unverified connections silently
description:
AprsIsClient::login() returns Ok(()) for both 'verified' and 'unverified' login responses. While 'unverified' means receive-only (passcode -1), callers cannot distinguish between these states after login. Consider returning an enum indicating verification status or storing it in the struct.

File: rust/lichen-gateway/src/aprs_is.rs lines 205-214
